title: Sofias Colombian Kitchen at The Manor House Tunbridge Wells
description:
We'll be hosting a special Colombian Dinner Party as we welcome Sofia's Colombian Kitchen to The Manor House!

This is not a regular dining night, but a one-off special event, celebrating Colombian food, music, and togetherness in a truly unique setting.

Dinner served from 7:30pm - 11pm

🍽 Guests will enjoy traditional Colombian dishes inspired by coastal flavours, followed by a vibrant Latin atmosphere filled with music, dancing, and feel-good energy.

💃🏾 Dance until 2am, with access to the downstairs club for those who wish to continue the celebration.

📌 Booking Information

Phone: +44 7789 861 364

Email: sofiabaguley46@gmail.com

• £45 per person

• Payment required at the time of booking

• All bookings are non-refundable

• Drinks served by The Manor House bar team

We can't wait to welcome you.
address: The Manor House Tunbridge Wells, Tunbridge Wells, England, TN1 1HT, United Kingdom

title: The BIG End of Exams Party 2026
description:
The biggest end-of-exams party of the summer! DJs, drinks, huge atmosphere & everyone together for one unforgettable night.

🎓✨ END OF EXAMS PARTY ✨🎓

After months of stress, revision, coursework, all-nighters, caffeine overload and pretending we knew what was going on... it's finally time to celebrate properly.

On Thursday 18th June, we're bringing everyone together for one massive end-of-exams party... one huge night before holidays, festivals and summer plans!

Expect:

  • Huge atmosphere
  • DJs + non-stop music
  • Drinks deals all night
  • Everyone from across the area in one place
  • The kind of night people talk about all summer

£2 Pints, £3 Double Vodka & Mixers, £10 for 4x Jagerbombs before midnight!

Whether your exams went perfectly or you survived entirely on luck and panic, this is the night to forget about revision and responsibilities for a few hours and just enjoy being done.

This is THE end-of-exams party.

Tickets will go quickly... once they're gone, they're gone.

Please note: The event information above has been added by the organiser. Whilst we try to ensure all details are up-to-date we do not make any warranty or representation as to the accuracy or completeness of the information shown.
address: The Manor House Tunbridge Wells, Tunbridge Wells, England, TN1 1HT, United Kingdom

title: Official Reunion 2000s & 2010s Anthems Day Party Tunbridge Wells
description:
A nostalgic reunion of Coco Lounge, Chez Moi, El Mono, Bar Fusion, Source of Sound & AMP-relive Tonbridge & Tunbridge Wells' 2000s & 2010s dancefloors

It’s time to take a trip down memory lane as we go back to the 2000s & 2010s!

For one day only, the original owner behind some of Tonbridge & Tunbridge Wells’ most well-known venues is bringing it all back together for an official reunion party like no other.

Expect the return of the DJs, the music, and the unforgettable energy that defined nights at Coco Lounge, El Mono, Bar Fusion, Source of Sound, AMP & Chez Moi.

We’re taking you straight to the dancefloor of the 2000s & 2010s - a non-stop soundtrack of the anthems that packed out clubs, made memories, and kept you coming back every weekend. From vocal house to R&B, dance classics to club bangers… if you were there, you already know.

Hosted at The Manor House, Tunbridge Wells - featuring a state-of-the-art main room plus one of the UK’s most talked-about beer gardens, with both front and back terraces ready for those summer day party vibes.

This isn’t just another event… it’s a proper reunion.

A chance to relive the best times, reconnect with familiar faces, and experience that old-school atmosphere all over again.

Limited tickets available now on Skiddle – don’t miss out.

Let’s rewind the clock and do it properly… one more time!
address: The Manor House Tunbridge Wells, Tunbridge Wells, England, TN1 1HT, United Kingdom

title: Oldies & Oldskool - 90's Nostalgia Party | Early Summer
description:
Let us take you back in time! Our 90's Nostalgia day party is back by popular demand!

An party tailored for those who appreciate great 90s dance & club classics. Expect an older crowd who love good company and a fantastic time in a friendly environment. We start early ensuring you can enjoy the afternoon without sacrificing your Sunday plans! It's an early doors concept!

The main dance-floor is a state-of-the-art, structure which opens out onto a lovely, big, heated, sheltered and cosy garden with its own bar and lots of comfortable seating which was featured in The Tabs Top 10 Nightclub Gardens in the UK!

Kick off at 2PM, but arrive earlier if you wish - food and drink offers available all day. Don't forget to take advantage of the photo-booth capturing the memories! Leave your mobile at home for a change? Well, maybe that's stretching it a bit!

Experience a top-notch sound system and state-of-the-art club visuals!

We can't wait to see you all again!
address: The Manor House Tunbridge Wells, Tunbridge Wells, England, TN1 1HT, United Kingdom

title: Project Pre-Loved Fashion Sale - Mums the Word
description:
Project Pre-loved fashion sale is BACK on Wednesday 2nd October and we can’t wait to see you all there ❤️

Taking place here in central Tunbridge Wells at The Manor House there will be 26 stalls of pre-loved fashion as well as local jewellery makers and independent/local fashion brands, plus a few ‘fun’ extras too including street food and our much-loved DJ’s on the decks for your 90s/00s requests! 🎶

The event will run in conjunction with Refugease - a small ‘n’ mighty charity! 10% of ticket sales will be donated to Refugease and any unsold stock can be donated to Refugease at the end of the evening.

SO…if you’ve got loads of high street goodies hanging in your wardrobe, feeling unworn and unloved, this is your sign to book a rail OR if you fancy doing your bit for the planet by shopping secondhand; grab your girlfriends and get ready to bag your ticket! 🤷‍♀️🎉

Tickets and rails will go on sale this Friday at midday… so please SAVE THE DATE & we’ll see you in October ❤️🥂
address: The Manor House Tunbridge Wells, Tunbridge Wells, England, TN1 1HT, United Kingdom
